findings.description: Bridge creation in createSecureWebView was creating a new EthereumBridge instance for every onRequest callback, wasting resources and breaking the reference chain
findings.details: Refactored to use bridgeHolder array pattern for self-referencing lambda capture

findings.description: ViewModel not using @HiltViewModel — acceptable because it requires WebView reference
findings.details: Documented in code comment, consistent with WalletViewModel from task 8

findings.description: JS injection script is well-documented with EIP-1193 and EIP-6963 compliance
findings.details: Good pattern: Object.freeze prevents tampering, _isMCW flag prevents double injection

summary: Clean implementation with good separation of concerns. Minor bridge reference issue fixed. All 35 tests pass. Code follows project patterns.
